title: Squirrel Removal in Morris Park, Bronx | $900 – $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal in Morris Park, Bronx. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Serving Morris Park residents since 2006. Call now for a free estimate!
intro: Morris Park homeowners know that squirrels can quickly turn from charming parkside neighbors to destructive attic invaders. Our professional squirrel removal services protect Morris Park's residential properties from the damage caused by these persistent rodents. Best Pest Control NYC offers humane, effective squirrel removal with guaranteed results throughout the Morris Park area.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Morris Park and the greater Bronx for over 15 years, delivering fast, humane squirrel removal with comprehensive exclusion services. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Morris Park's mix of single-family homes and multi-family dwellings, providing customized solutions that keep squirrels out for good.
localContext: Morris Park's tree-lined streets and proximity to Bronx Park make it a prime area for squirrel activity, with older homes near Morris Park Avenue and Williamsbridge Road especially vulnerable to attic invasions. The neighborhood's established residential blocks with mature oak and maple trees provide ideal habitats that bring squirrels into close contact with rooflines and ventilation systems.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Morris Park?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Morris Park typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and necessary repairs. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and entry point sealing. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Morris Park properties.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Morris Park attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the attic during early morning or evening hours, visible damage to roof soffits or vents, chewed wiring or insulation, and squirrel droppings in your attic space. Morris Park homeowners often notice increased activity during fall and spring when squirrels seek nesting sites.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane in Morris Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, live-trapping methods compliant with New York State wildlife regulations. We safely capture and relocate squirrels away from residential areas, then seal all entry points to prevent re-entry. Our approach prioritizes animal welfare while effectively protecting your Morris Park home.

faqs.question: How long does squirrel removal take in Morris Park homes?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Morris Park are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. The initial trapping phase typically takes 2-5 days, followed by exclusion work and repairs. We monitor traps daily and provide regular updates throughout the process to ensure complete removal.
